name: Medieval Text Adventure Game
story:
You are a knight for the kingdom of Tovaria who has just returned from a personal mission given to you by the King.
You enter the royal castle to find it has been invaded by a Dragon.
You will need to defeat the Dragon before it steals all of the castle's gold and burns everyone to a crisp,
but first you will need a collection of items to aid you in your fight.
You will need a Bow to attack long-range,
a Healing Potion to max out your health before battle,
the royal families Shield to block fire attacks,
Armor to defend yourself,
an Ancient Scroll you can summon a familiar with for back up,
and a Sword to attack close-range.
loseBattleMessage: You were burnt to a crisp by the Dragon!
